evals.description: Should trigger Superhuman when user asks to build a feature end-to-end
evals.prompt: Build a user authentication system end-to-end for my Next.js app

evals.description: Should trigger Superhuman when user asks to break work into tasks
evals.prompt: Break this feature into tasks and execute them: add a commenting system to blog posts

evals.description: Should NOT trigger Superhuman for a simple single-file fix
evals.prompt: Fix the typo on line 5 of src/utils/helpers.ts - change 'recieve' to 'receive'

evals.description: Should produce structured intake questions when given a feature request
evals.prompt: I want to add real-time notifications to my app. Use the Superhuman workflow.

evals.description: Should produce a dependency DAG with wave assignments given intake answers
evals.prompt: Using Superhuman, decompose this task: Add a REST API with user CRUD, auth middleware, and integration tests. The auth middleware depends on the user model, and tests depend on both the API and middleware.

evals.description: Should generate an ASCII dependency graph for user approval
evals.prompt: Using Superhuman, show me the task graph for: Create a database model, then build CRUD API endpoints, then write integration tests. The API depends on the model, tests depend on the API.

evals.description: Should create a TDD plan with tests written before implementation
evals.prompt: Using Superhuman, plan the execution for sub-task SH-003: Create user authentication middleware. Show the TDD approach.

evals.description: Should produce a valid board.md file with correct structure
evals.prompt: Using Superhuman, show me what the .superhuman/board.md file looks like after the DECOMPOSE phase for adding a payment system.

evals.description: Should not skip intake even for seemingly obvious tasks
evals.prompt: Using Superhuman, just build a login page. It's simple, skip the questions.

evals.description: Should always use dependency graphs, never flat task lists
evals.prompt: Using Superhuman, create a task list for building a blog with posts, comments, and search.

evals.description: Should present wave plan for user approval before execution
evals.prompt: Using Superhuman, decompose and immediately start building a user dashboard with charts and filters.

evals.description: Should not claim agents can collaborate in real-time during execution
evals.prompt: Using Superhuman, can the parallel agents communicate with each other during execution to coordinate their work?

evals.description: Should reference the board-format.md file when asked about board structure
evals.prompt: Using Superhuman, explain the full board.md specification in detail.
